approval_workflow.summary: Maintainers integrate on staging, run release readiness gates, obtain human approval per docs/reports gate headings, then tag vX.Y.Z and publish GitHub Releases using the release notes template.

non_goals: This manifest does not authorize production promotions by itself.
Release documentation does not replace cargo test, pytest, or hosted audit verification when code changes.
The release subsystem does not mutate billing state, ledgers, or tenant isolation configuration.
This program does not perform network calls or publish to external registries automatically.
release_channels: Git annotated tags vX.Y.Z on promoted commits
GitHub Releases (or equivalent) with Markdown body from docs/releases/release-notes-template.md
release_program: GovAI Core release engineering: changelog validation, deterministic release note generation, readiness reporting, Makefile gates, and CI artifact builds aligned with staging integration and promotion to main.

rollback_policy.summary: Rollback is documentation-first: revert offending commits on staging or main, restore prior tag only when policy allows, and publish a follow-up PATCH release; see release checklist failure modes and security release process for embargoed fixes.
